title: gh-132176: Fix crash on `type()` when `tuple` subclass passed as `bases`
author: sobolevn

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Thanks @sobolevn for the PR 🌮🎉.. I'm working now to backport this PR to: 3.13.
🐍🍒⛏🤖

comments.author: bedevere-app[bot]
comments.body: [GH-132548](https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/132548) is a backport of this pull request to the [3.13 branch](https://github.com/python/cpython/tree/3.13).

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: aarch64 Fedora Stable LTO + PGO 3.x and aarch64 Fedora Stable LTO 3.13 failed because their disk is full, see: https://github.com/python/cpython/issues/132553.
